title: Frisket Preflight Golden Corpus Manifest
description: Maps golden fixture PDFs to the profile they are checked against and the outcome frisket-preflight is expected to produce. Consumed by UnitTestsPreflightCorpus.

id.description: Stable fixture id (kebab-case). Also used as the snapshot file name.

pdf.description: Fixture PDF file name, relative to frisket-preflight/testdata/fixtures/.

profile.description: Profile JSON path, relative to frisket-preflight/.

check_ids.description: check_id values that must appear in report.errors[] or report.warnings[]. Leave empty for a clean pass.

source.description: Where the fixture came from (see frisket-preflight/README.md).

pending.description: When true, UnitTestsPreflightCorpus skips this entry: the check(s) it exercises are not yet implemented in the engine, so its expect{} records the intended future outcome rather than current behavior. Drop this flag (and add a snapshot) once the check lands. See frisket-preflight/README.md ('Hand-built custom-check fixtures').

notes.description: Short human-readable description of what the fixture exercises.
